name: The man from the shadow
description:
Human august! Before his death and revival as the man from the shadow!

God I need more of human august only saw ONE artist draw him human

He’s 49 and German in this bot(and has a dad bod BECAUSE I SAID SO!)

Art credit: dkrista_DK on twitter!!

Updated his personality and first message to his current lore!
